files.text:
defmodule MyApp.Payments do
  def describe(status) do
    case status do
      :pending -> "awaiting capture"
      :captured -> "captured"
      :refunded -> "refunded"
      :failed -> "failed"
    end
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.Payments do
  def describe(:pending), do: "awaiting capture"
  def describe(:captured), do: "captured"
  def describe(:refunded), do: "refunded"
  def describe(:failed), do: "failed"
end

defmodule MyApp.Payments do
  def describe(charge) do
    case classify(charge) do
      {:terminal, label} -> label
      {:transient, retry_after} -> "retry in #{retry_after}s"
    end
  end

  defp classify(%{status: :captured}), do: {:terminal, "captured"}
  defp classify(%{status: :failed, retry_after: retry}), do: {:transient, retry}
end
